data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast retrieval for session playback/review.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fast retrieval for session playback/review, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for fast retrieval, yet the evidence does not demonstrate any specific implementation or performance metrics related to this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence supporting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of fast retrieval mechanisms for session playback/review.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add performance metrics for retrieval
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete performance metrics that demonstrate fast retrieval capabilities.
